steps.title: Apply the modifier rule
steps.content: The opening phrase Defined by a disorganized molecular structure must be followed by the noun it describes. The previous sentence identifies amorphous ice as the ice with that disorganized structure.

steps.title: Reject dangling modifiers
steps.content: Choice A and Choice D start with ice Ih, which the passage says has a hexagonal crystalline structure. Choice C starts with a lack of thermal energy, which cannot be defined by a molecular structure. The answer is B.
